turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Hey Bob, I finally adopted that border collie I told you about. Her name is Maple and she's almost two years old.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: That's wonderful! Where did you get her from?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: From the Riverside Rescue shelter in Brooklyn. They're amazing — I'm thinking of volunteering there on Saturdays.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Border collies need a lot of exercise. Are you and Maple doing alright in the apartment?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Honestly cramped. I'm seriously considering moving to Hoboken so we have room for a yard. The rents are wild though.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Hey, you mentioned starting volunteering — how's that going?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Started two weeks ago, on April 7th. I walk the senior dogs in the morning shift. It's exhausting but I love it.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Did you ever decide on the Hoboken move?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Yes! I signed a lease on a place on Garden Street. Moving in next month. Maple is going to lose her mind over the yard.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Congrats! Also — I'm flying to Lisbon in June for a conference. Want me to bring you back some pastel de nata?

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Incredible. I gave my talk on retrieval-augmented agents at WebSummit and somehow people actually came. I brought you a box of nata!

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: You're the best. Drop them off Saturday after my shelter shift?

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Deal. How's Maple liking the new yard?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: She has fully turned feral. Caught a squirrel yesterday. I'm so proud and horrified.

qa.question: What is the name of Alice's dog?
What breed of dog did Alice adopt?
Where does Alice volunteer and what city did she move to?
qa.answer: Riverside Rescue shelter in Brooklyn; Hoboken

qa.question: When did Alice start volunteering at the shelter?
How many months passed between Alice adopting Maple and her moving to Hoboken?
What kind of pastry did Bob bring back from Lisbon, and what is it made of?
qa.answer: pastel de nata; a Portuguese egg custard tart in flaky pastry

qa.question: What is the name of Bob's cat?
